---
title: "Poster Gallery"
listing:
  contents: 
  - "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, date]
  date-format: iso
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  feed: false
  page-size: 6
---

Below are posters that I have created and presented during my undergraduate and graduate career.

Click on a card to view a poster and read the abstract!
